boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the security operator execute the incident-response action now? Focus: mass password reset.

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact execution boundary. The control record leaves the required dependency unresolved, and policy requires exact source closure before action. Escalate and wait for the affected user set and comms approval match before any mass password reset proceeds.
